en.intro.invitation: A Journey of Two Souls, One Heart
en.intro.personalMessage: You are cordially invited to celebrate the wedding of Dhanya & Rahul. We would like to invite you to celebrate with us the most special day of our lives.
en.reveal.title: Reveal
en.reveal.subtitle: Scratch to discover the date
en.reveal.scratchHint: Scratch all three circles to continue
en.welcome.title: Welcome!
en.welcome.message: We warmly invite you to celebrate our wedding day with us in the beautiful town of Thevalakkara, Kerala. We look forward to sharing this unforgettable moment with our most special people.
en.countdown.title: Countdown
en.saveTheDate.celebrationAt: The celebration will take place at
en.saveTheDate.receptionToFollow: Dhanya Weds Rahul - Saat Phere | 11:30 AM
en.events.title: Events
en.events.mehndi.name: Mehndi
en.events.sangeet.name: Sangeet
en.events.wedding.name: Wedding (Saat Phere)
en.events.reception.name: Reception
en.dressCode.title: Dress Code
en.dressCode.description: Each event has its own dress code to make the celebration vibrant and colourful.
en.dressCode.formal:
• Mehndi: Pink Colour Theme
• Pudava & Sangeet: Sharara (Girls) & Kurta with Dupatta (Guys)
• Saat Phere: Davani (Girls) & Mundu with Kurta (Guys)
• Reception: No Dress Code
en.gifts.title: Gifts
en.gifts.message: Your presence is the best gift we could receive. However, if you wish to contribute to our new life together, you can do so via bank transfer.
en.transport.title: Location & Transportation
en.transport.description: Akhil Convention Centre, Shankaramangalam Koyivila Rd, Thevalakkara, Kerala 691590
en.transport.directions: From Kollam Town: ~30min via NH66 | From Karunagappally: ~20min via Thevalakkara Rd
en.transport.rsvpNote: Please bless us with your presence for all three days of celebration.
